title: Token source is not bound to the caller, allowing theft from any approved account
reason: Merged into F-001 because the missing binding between `from` and the caller is the concrete exploitation path of the broader arbitrary-action execution bug, not a distinct root cause.

title: Zeroed slippage fields allow side-effect-only execution with no real swap output
reason: The PoC passes zeroed slippage fields, but the available code only proves those parameters were accepted in this exploit path. It does not show that null output constraints are an independent bug rather than normal behavior for this entrypoint or merely incidental to the arbitrary-call issue.
